creator: rmgartland@virginia.edu
text:
amrecover listing shows duplicate directory entries:

amrecover> ls
2012-02-21-04-00-01 robert/
2012-02-21-04-00-01 brady/
2012-02-21-04-00-01 .snap/
2012-02-21-04-00-01 .
2012-02-20-04-00-00 robert/
2012-02-19-04-00-01 robert/
2012-02-18-04-00-01 robert/
2012-02-17-04-00-01 video
2012-02-17-04-00-01 robert/
2012-02-17-04-00-01 pictures
2012-02-17-04-00-01 photos
2012-02-17-04-00-01 music
2012-02-17-04-00-01 .sujournal
amrecover> cd robert
Too many directories matching 'robert'

How-To-Repeat: Always when multiple backup levels exist.
